{{Quote|Our first loyalty is to our own homeworld…|Mellor Yago|<ref name="SWR69" />}}
'''Mellor Yago''' was an officer in the [[Rendili Home Defense Fleet]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], serving aboard the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] ''[[Mersel Kebir]]''.

==Biography==
{{Quote|So we should obey orders when you will not? I don't think so, Captain. You're under arrest in the name of the independent provisional government of Rendili. We're taking command of the fleet, traitor!|Mellor Yago to Jace Dallin|<ref name="SWR69">[[Republic 69|''Republic'' 69]]</ref>}}
[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] Yago felt that that Rendili would be better off if it left the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and took its powerful fleet to the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]—with him in command. Yago was personally responsible for leading the mutiny that captured Rendili fleet commander [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Jace Dallin]], [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Plo Koon/Legends|Plo Koon]], and Republic Captain [[Jan Dodonna/Legends|Jan Dodonna]]. He then took command of the fleet and used it to attack the Republic forces with the aid of his Confederacy reinforcements.

However, the prisoners were freed by [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] Masters [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]]. Dallin personally [[Death/Legends|killed]] Yago and took control of the fleet again, ending the mutiny.
